---
title: "spatial overlap"
author: "R. Cunning"
date: "2026-03-02"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Where do species occur?
```{r}
# load pixel grid raster (any DHW product used in analysis)
reef_pixel_grid <- rast("data/spatial/reef_pixel_grid.tif")

# load DRM dataset (transects 1 and 2, all years) and aggregate taxa
drm_data <- read_csv("data/drm/FRRP_EXPORT.csv") %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, Site, Date, Latitude, Longitude) %>%
  mutate(Species = case_when(Species %in% c("AFRA", "AGAR", "AGRA", "AHUM", "ALAM") ~ "AGAR",
                             Species %in% c("MALI", "MLAM", "MYCE", "MFER") ~ "MYCE",
                             Species %in% c("IRIG", "ISIN", "ISOP") ~ "ISOP",
                             Species %in% c("OCUL", "ODIF") ~ "OCUL",
                             Species %in% c("SHYA", "SBOU") ~ "SOLE",
                             Species %in% c("SCOL", "SCUB", "SLAC", "SWEL") ~ "SCOL",
                             Species %in% c("OFAV", "OFRA", "OANN") ~ "ORBI",
                             TRUE ~ Species)) %>%
  drop_na(Species) %>%
  mutate(Date = mdy_hms(Date),
         year = year(Date))

# must contain lat, lon, Species, and count
pts <- vect(drm_data, geom = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = crs(reef_pixel_grid))

# extract pixel ID for each observed coral
drm_data$pixel <- extract(reef_pixel_grid, pts, cells = TRUE)$cell
```

# Count corals in well-surveyed pixels
```{r}
# Define survey effort per 5km pixel
eff <- drm_data %>%
  distinct(pixel, Site) %>%
  count(pixel, name = "n_surveys")

min_effort <- 10

good_pixels <- eff %>%
  filter(n_surveys >= min_effort) %>%
  pull(pixel)


# define target species subset (those we analyze for ∆°C with dens. change)
densdiffs <- readRDS("data/processed/dens20142023.rds")
myspp <- as_tibble(densdiffs) %>% drop_na() %>% pull(Species)

# Filter for only target species in only well-surveyed pixels
drm_data_f <- drm_data %>% 
  filter(Species %in% myspp) %>%
  filter(pixel %in% good_pixels)

# Count individuals per species per pixel
sp_pixel <- drm_data_f %>%
  group_by(pixel, Species) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

# Then create a species by pixel matrix
mat <- sp_pixel %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Species, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

sp_mat <- as.matrix(mat[,-1])   # pixels x species
rownames(sp_mat) <- mat$pixel   # optional but helpful

# Quantify spatial overlap among species

# Jaccard distance presence/absence overlap
pa <- sp_mat > 0
dist_jac <- vegan::vegdist(t(pa), method = "jaccard")

library(pheatmap)
pheatmap(as.matrix(dist_jac))




# presence/absence matrix: pixels x species (TRUE/FALSE)
pa <- sp_mat > 0

# shared pixel counts between species (species x species)
shared_n <- crossprod(pa)   # same as tcrossprod(t(pa)); clearer here

# add names if missing
colnames(shared_n) <- colnames(pa)
rownames(shared_n) <- colnames(pa)

# remove diagonal (self-overlap)
diag(shared_n) <- NA_integer_

shared_n

# Number of pixels each species occupies
n_pix <- colSums(pa)
n_pix

# proportion of i's occupied pixels that are also occupied by j
shared_prop_of_i <- sweep(shared_n, 1, n_pix, "/")
shared_prop_of_i
shared_prop_of_i["SSID","CNAT"]


# symmetric jaccard overlap (nice single metric)
# intersection / union
union_n <- outer(n_pix, n_pix, "+") - shared_n
jaccard <- shared_n / union_n
jaccard

# Median overlap across all species pairs
median_overlap <- median(shared_prop_of_i, na.rm = TRUE)
median_overlap
```


```{r}
# cell centers
cent <- as.data.frame(xyFromCell(pixel_grid, 1:ncell(pixel_grid)))
cent$pixel <- 1:ncell(pixel_grid)
names(cent)[1:2] <- c("lon", "lat")


# Choose presence/absence for clarity (recommended)
sp_pa <- sp_pixel %>%
  mutate(present = n > 0) %>%
  dplyr::select(pixel, Species, present)

# make full grid so absences are explicit
all_species <- sort(unique(sp_pa$Species))
all_pixels  <- sort(unique(sp_pa$pixel))

sp_pa_full <- tidyr::expand_grid(pixel = all_pixels, Species = all_species) %>%
  left_join(sp_pa, by = c("pixel", "Species")) %>%
  mutate(present = if_else(is.na(present), FALSE, present)) %>%
  left_join(cent, by = "pixel")



pixel_order <- sp_pa_full %>%
  distinct(pixel, lat) %>%
  arrange(lat) %>%
  mutate(pixel_rank = row_number())

sp_pa_full <- sp_pa_full %>%
  left_join(pixel_order, by = c("pixel","lat"))



ggplot(sp_pa_full, aes(x = pixel_rank, y = Species, fill = present)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "DHW pixel (ordered south → north by latitude)",
       y = NULL,
       fill = "Present") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
```


# Get 2023 species distributions across pixels
```{r}
# Load 2023 DRM dataset
load("data/processed/2023.RData")

# Aggregate taxa
df23 <- df23 %>%
  mutate(Species = case_when(Species %in% c("AFRA", "AGAR", "AGRA", "AHUM", "ALAM") ~ "AGAR",
                             Species %in% c("MALI", "MLAM", "MYCE", "MFER") ~ "MYCE",
                             Species %in% c("IRIG", "ISIN", "ISOP") ~ "ISOP",
                             Species %in% c("OCUL", "ODIF") ~ "OCUL",
                             Species %in% c("SHYA", "SBOU") ~ "SOLE",
                             Species %in% c("SCOL", "SCUB", "SLAC", "SWEL") ~ "SCOL",
                             Species %in% c("OFAV", "OFRA", "OANN") ~ "ORBI",
                             TRUE ~ Species)) %>%
  drop_na(Species)

# define target species subset (those we analyze for ∆°C with dens. change)
#densdiffs <- readRDS("data/processed/dens20142023.rds")
#myspp <- as_tibble(densdiffs) %>% drop_na() %>% pull(Species)
#df23f <- df23 %>% filter(Species %in% myspp) %>% droplevels()
df23f <- df23 %>% 
  group_by(Species) %>%
  filter(sum(n()) > 20) %>%
  ungroup()

# must contain lat, lon, Species, and count
pts23 <- vect(df23f, geom = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = crs(reef_pixel_grid))

# extract pixel ID for each observed coral
df23f$pixel <- raster::extract(reef_pixel_grid, pts23, cells = TRUE)$cell

# some species surveyed 40 m2 each site, rest surveyed 20 m2 at each site
sp_40 <- c("CNAT", "DSTO", "DLAB", "MMEA", "MANG", "MYCE", "PCLI", "PSTR")
all_species <- sort(unique(df23f$Species))

# 1) count corals per site × species (observed only)
site_sp <- df23f %>%
  group_by(Site, pixel, Species) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

# 2) expand to include zeros for species that were searched but absent
site_sp_full <- site_sp %>%
  group_by(Site, pixel) %>%
  complete(Species = all_species, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 3) attach species-specific surveyed area (effort) and compute density
site_sp_full <- site_sp_full %>%
  mutate(area_m2 = if_else(Species %in% sp_40, 40, 20),
         dens_m2 = n / area_m2)

# 4) aggregate density to pixel × species
pixel_sp <- site_sp_full %>%
  group_by(pixel, Species) %>%
  summarise(dens_m2 = mean(dens_m2), .groups = "drop")
  # alt: sum(dens_m2) or weighted mean if sites differ in area beyond 20/40

# 5) normalize within species to get pixel weights that sum to 1
pixel_weights <- pixel_sp %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  mutate(w_pixel = dens_m2 / sum(dens_m2)) %>%
  ungroup()

pixel_weights

# visualize pixel weights

# table: pixel (cell id) + lon/lat
pix_xy <- as.data.frame(reef_pixel_grid, xy = TRUE, cells = TRUE, na.rm = FALSE) %>%
  transmute(pixel = cell, lon = x, lat = y)

# join coords onto weights
pixel_weights_xy <- pixel_weights %>%
  left_join(pix_xy, by = "pixel")

# visualize pixel weights
pixel_weights_xy %>%
  filter(w_pixel > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(lon, lat, fill = w_pixel)) +
  geom_raster() +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_wrap(~ Species) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(trans = "log10")

write_csv(pixel_weights_xy, file = "data/processed/sp_pixel_weights.csv")
```



# Pixel weights for all corals
```{r}
# ============================================================
# OVERALL (ALL-CORALS) EFFORT-WEIGHTED PIXEL WEIGHTS
# ============================================================

# 1) count corals per site × species (observed only)
site_sp <- df23f %>%
  group_by(Site, pixel, Species) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

# 2) expand to include zeros for species that were searched but absent
site_sp_full <- site_sp %>%
  group_by(Site, pixel) %>%
  complete(Species = all_species, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 3) attach species-specific surveyed area (effort) and compute density
site_sp_full <- site_sp_full %>%
  mutate(area_m2 = if_else(Species %in% sp_40, 40, 20),
         dens_m2 = n / area_m2)

# 4) collapse within site × pixel to "all corals" density (sum over species)
site_pix_all <- site_sp_full %>%
  group_by(Site, pixel) %>%
  summarise(dens_m2_all = sum(dens_m2), .groups = "drop")

# 5) aggregate to pixel (same logic as your species weights: mean across sites)
pixel_all <- site_pix_all %>%
  group_by(pixel) %>%
  summarise(dens_m2_all = mean(dens_m2_all), .groups = "drop")

# 6) normalize across pixels to get weights summing to 1
pixel_weights_all <- pixel_all %>%
  mutate(w_pixel_all = dens_m2_all / sum(dens_m2_all))

pixel_weights_all

# visualize pixel weights
# table: pixel (cell id) + lon/lat
# join coords onto weights
pixel_weights_all_xy <- pixel_weights_all %>%
  left_join(pix_xy, by = "pixel")

pixel_weights_all_xy %>%
  filter(w_pixel_all > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(lon, lat, fill = w_pixel_all)) +
  geom_raster() +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(trans = "log10")

write_csv(pixel_weights_all_xy, file = "data/processed/pixel_weights_all.csv")
```
